title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Zerodha

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Zerodha
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Zerodha in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zerodha:
Zerodha is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha!
